programme.title: Mary J. Blige's Family Affair
programme.desc: Tensions rise between Kendra and Ben as they move out of the city and struggle with fertility issues. Their relationship reaches a boiling point when Ben secretly helps his brother, while Kendra returns to the city and reunites with an old friend.

programme.title: Troppo
programme.desc: Ted and Amanda save Raph's life and solve Julian's murder, only to be faced with rescuing Ted's family from a predator who has had Ted in his crosshairs for years.

programme.title: Psycho Therapy: The Shallow Tale of a Writer Who Decided to Write About a Serial Killer
programme.desc: A writer befriends a retired serial killer in a desperate attempt to find inspiration for his next novel and save his marriage. Covering as his marriage counselor, the killer teaches him his methods as reality becomes deadlier than fiction.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Troppo
programme.desc: Ted and Amanda save Raph's life and solve Julian's murder, only to be faced with rescuing Ted's family from a predator who has had Ted in his crosshairs for years.

programme.title: Psycho Therapy: The Shallow Tale of a Writer Who Decided to Write About a Serial Killer
programme.desc: A writer befriends a retired serial killer in a desperate attempt to find inspiration for his next novel and save his marriage. Covering as his marriage counselor, the killer teaches him his methods as reality becomes deadlier than fiction.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mary J. Blige's Family Affair
programme.desc: Tensions rise between Kendra and Ben as they move out of the city and struggle with fertility issues. Their relationship reaches a boiling point when Ben secretly helps his brother, while Kendra returns to the city and reunites with an old friend.

programme.title: Trapped in the Spotlight
programme.desc: A psychotic music producer kidnaps a cancelled R&B singer and her former co-star 15 years after they broke up. With their lives and legacies on the line, the estranged duo must face the demons from their past to make it out alive.

programme.title: Cruise Ship Killers
programme.desc: A retired teacher takes a solo Great Lakes cruise toward a family reunion; but when she doesn't check in with her family members back home, her loved ones begins to suspect something bad has befallen her.

programme.title: Cruise Ship Killers
programme.desc: A German college student working aboard on a cruise ship goes missing at an Alaskan port; did she decide to skip out on her duties or did a terrible fate await her on-shore?

programme.title: Finally Caught
programme.desc: The murder of Afrikka Hardy in 2014 turns out to be a catalyst for the investigation that ultimately exposes the crimes committed by Darren Deon Vann.

programme.title: Finally Caught
programme.desc: On August 26, 2011, Amanda Plasse becomes the victim of a brutal murder; it takes years before the culprit gets arrested and her mother also fights to pass a law that prevents unauthorized sharing of crime scene photos.

programme.title: Fatal Fixer-Upper
programme.desc: A couple couldn't be happier after buying their dream home from a mysterious man named Josh. However, their newfound paradise turns into a living nightmare as Josh seems unwilling to let the house go.

programme.title: Finally Caught
programme.desc: A devoted mother vanishes on Thanksgiving Day, leaving behind a mystery that stuns a small Colorado town. As investigators dig into her disappearance, they uncover a chilling plot fueled by deception, betrayal, and a desperate fight for control.

programme.title: Aliens Abducted My Parents and Now I Feel Kinda Left Out
programme.desc: High school journalist Itsy befriends her space-obsessed neighbor Calvin. After he convinces her that his parents were abducted by aliens, together they concoct a plan to get them back.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Cruise Ship Killers
programme.desc: A retired teacher takes a solo Great Lakes cruise toward a family reunion; but when she doesn't check in with her family members back home, her loved ones begins to suspect something bad has befallen her.

programme.title: Cruise Ship Killers
programme.desc: A German college student working aboard on a cruise ship goes missing at an Alaskan port; did she decide to skip out on her duties or did a terrible fate await her on-shore?

programme.title: Finally Caught
programme.desc: The murder of Afrikka Hardy in 2014 turns out to be a catalyst for the investigation that ultimately exposes the crimes committed by Darren Deon Vann.

programme.title: Finally Caught
programme.desc: On August 26, 2011, Amanda Plasse becomes the victim of a brutal murder; it takes years before the culprit gets arrested and her mother also fights to pass a law that prevents unauthorized sharing of crime scene photos.

programme.title: Fatal Fixer-Upper
programme.desc: A couple couldn't be happier after buying their dream home from a mysterious man named Josh. However, their newfound paradise turns into a living nightmare as Josh seems unwilling to let the house go.

programme.title: A Killer Behind Closed Doors
programme.desc: Melissa learns that her new husband, Kevin, is a philanderer with no ambition. The two become roommates from hell while Kevin remains in the house until the divorce is finalized, but when he turns up dead, all eyes are on Melissa.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Aliens Abducted My Parents and Now I Feel Kinda Left Out
programme.desc: High school journalist Itsy befriends her space-obsessed neighbor Calvin. After he convinces her that his parents were abducted by aliens, together they concoct a plan to get them back.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Boiling Point
programme.desc: Point North caters its first wedding and the team celebrate with a huge night out; Carly learns some important news about the future of the restaurant.

programme.title: The Breach
programme.desc: Counting down his last days as chief of police in the tiny town of Lone Crow, John Hawkins must investigate one last case when a mangled body with uncanny wounds washes up on the shores of the Porcupine River.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Boiling Point
programme.desc: Point North caters its first wedding and the team celebrate with a huge night out; Carly learns some important news about the future of the restaurant.

programme.title: Finally Caught
programme.desc: A devoted mother vanishes on Thanksgiving Day, leaving behind a mystery that stuns a small Colorado town. As investigators dig into her disappearance, they uncover a chilling plot fueled by deception, betrayal, and a desperate fight for control.

programme.title: The Breach
programme.desc: Counting down his last days as chief of police in the tiny town of Lone Crow, John Hawkins must investigate one last case when a mangled body with uncanny wounds washes up on the shores of the Porcupine River.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Fatal Fixer-Upper
programme.desc: A couple couldn't be happier after buying their dream home from a mysterious man named Josh. However, their newfound paradise turns into a living nightmare as Josh seems unwilling to let the house go.

programme.title: Aliens Abducted My Parents and Now I Feel Kinda Left Out
programme.desc: High school journalist Itsy befriends her space-obsessed neighbor Calvin. After he convinces her that his parents were abducted by aliens, together they concoct a plan to get them back.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: A Killer Behind Closed Doors
programme.desc: Melissa learns that her new husband, Kevin, is a philanderer with no ambition. The two become roommates from hell while Kevin remains in the house until the divorce is finalized, but when he turns up dead, all eyes are on Melissa.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: One Way Mirror
programme.desc: James Lally admits that he has killed his partner Suzanne LaPierre; it takes more than confession for police to locate her body, leading authorities to a long interrogation with a character who seems more concerned with his own comfort.

programme.title: One Way Mirror
programme.desc: A messy divorce leads to a woman hiding a large sum of money with one of her close friends; when the woman goes missing, her friend, Ashley, is believed to be involved in more than just attempted fraud.

programme.title: Heartland Homicide
programme.desc: Just outside Athens, Wis., Kenneth Kunz finds four of his family members murdered and one missing; investigators determine whether it was his mother, a local farm boy, or the rumored family drug dealing connections that led to the brutal slayings.

programme.title: Heartland Homicide
programme.desc: The chief of police in Sparta, Mich., leads an investigation into what happened to his family friend and babysitter, who is reported missing when she doesn't come home from Christmas shopping, and is found beneath a snow bank weeks later.

programme.title: Finally Caught
programme.desc: A young Navy wife is brutally murdered while home alone in Norfolk, Va.; DNA and genetic genealogy lead to a shocking truth, her killer is linked to another long-unsolved crime, hiding an even darker secret.

programme.title: Gaslit by My Husband: The Morgan Metzer Story
programme.desc: After a masked intruder assaults Morgan Metzer in her home, her ex-husband, Rodney, shows up minutes later. Questioned by the authorities, Rodney's story doesn't seem to add up, making him the prime suspect in the attack.

programme.title: Tuesday
programme.desc: A mother and her daughter must confront Death when it arrives in the form of an astonishing talking bird.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: One Way Mirror
programme.desc: James Lally admits that he has killed his partner Suzanne LaPierre; it takes more than confession for police to locate her body, leading authorities to a long interrogation with a character who seems more concerned with his own comfort.

programme.title: One Way Mirror
programme.desc: A messy divorce leads to a woman hiding a large sum of money with one of her close friends; when the woman goes missing, her friend, Ashley, is believed to be involved in more than just attempted fraud.

programme.title: Heartland Homicide
programme.desc: Just outside Athens, Wis., Kenneth Kunz finds four of his family members murdered and one missing; investigators determine whether it was his mother, a local farm boy, or the rumored family drug dealing connections that led to the brutal slayings.

programme.title: Heartland Homicide
programme.desc: The chief of police in Sparta, Mich., leads an investigation into what happened to his family friend and babysitter, who is reported missing when she doesn't come home from Christmas shopping, and is found beneath a snow bank weeks later.

programme.title: Finally Caught
programme.desc: A young Navy wife is brutally murdered while home alone in Norfolk, Va.; DNA and genetic genealogy lead to a shocking truth, her killer is linked to another long-unsolved crime, hiding an even darker secret.

programme.title: Gaslit by My Husband: The Morgan Metzer Story
programme.desc: After a masked intruder assaults Morgan Metzer in her home, her ex-husband, Rodney, shows up minutes later. Questioned by the authorities, Rodney's story doesn't seem to add up, making him the prime suspect in the attack.

programme.title: Tuesday
programme.desc: A mother and her daughter must confront Death when it arrives in the form of an astonishing talking bird.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: How Not to Hire a Hitman
programme.desc: While Frank and Nancy may have drifted apart in their long marriage, they are still on solid ground. But when one of them is confronted by a gunman in their driveway while the other is away, police follow a money trail stretching back several years. With so many people involved in the crime, can they figure out who pulled the trigger?

programme.title: Barons
programme.desc: Buddy and Hunter make Trotter an offer he can't refuse to launch LightWave in the US.

programme.title: Starve Acre
programme.desc: Dark and sinister forces invade an archaeologist's home as he investigates a mythic folklore about an ancient oak tree on his land.
